summary: Fixed hx doti update worktree-leak/commit-race/silent-swallow (commit-after-dispose via RunWorktreeScoped; surface Commit.Failed as ok:false/non-zero/Integrity for update+update-all; ownership-aware leaked-temp sweep+prune with a 10-min age floor; retry-on-transient-lock) + the vendored-tool reconcile/parity gap (tools/{gitleaks,sentrux,gitversion} now reconciled by update + checked by payload check with a 'run hx tools fetch' advisory; exe stays offline-fetched).
